event_name: UPSTAIRS ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS: FELIX CARTAL
description: Award winning Canadian DJ/Producer Felix Cartal returns to Upstairs for his album release tour "I sabotage". Felix Cartal is a prolific producer and DJ that hails from Vancouver, Canada. His style is energetic and melodic, and his shows match. His resume is vast, including collabs with Kaskade, Elohim, and Daya, as well as remixes for The Chainsmokers, Selena Gomez, Zedd, Illenium, and nimino's hit "I Only Smoke When I Drink" to name a few. Felix has racked up a string of hits, and won 2 JUNO Awards for Best Dance Recording (2020's "Love Me" and 2024's "Need Your Love"). Recently, he released his latest album, i, sabotage , which includes collab tracks "Right On Time" (with the iconic Tegan and Sara), "Feel Less" (with Lights), and "Dancing in a Dream" (with Rêve). He also continued his legendary pop up parties, culminating with a 5,000 person beach party in Vancouver and the first ever rave at the top of the CN Tower in Toronto. His club ready house tracks are cherished by fans across the spectrum of dance music.
location: UPSTAIRS ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS : THE FREE LABEL, Upstairs Entertainment Ltd, 15 Bastion Square, Vic, Unknown, BC, Canada
